result.reasoning: The three proposed lines correspond to Broward County Transit routes: Line 1 (Sunrise Blvd & A1A to Sawgrass Mills Mall) is Route 36; Line 2 (Dania Beach to Broward College Central Campus) is Route 12; Line 3 (Galt Mile to Commercial Blvd & 94th Ave) is Route 55. The January 2023 ridership report provides monthly passenger totals: Route 12: 55,180; Route 36: 72,540; Route 55: 59,520. Multiplying each by $5 per trip gives monthly revenues: Route 12: 55,180 × 5 = $275,900; Route 36: 72,540 × 5 = $362,700; Route 55: 59,520 × 5 = $297,600. The most popular line is Route 36 with revenue of $362,700. The task requests the revenue in dollars; following formatting rules, we output the numeric value without currency symbol or thousands separators. Applied casing rule: not applicable as final answer is numeric.
